creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #15)
HID report descriptor appeared to be broken. It contains records for external left and right buttons which is wrong for clickpads.

Linux seems to "fix" it at libinput level with placing a quirk in to /usr/local/share/libinput/50-framework.quirks file. But it does not work in your case due to slightly different device name: "PIXA3854:00 093A:0274 Touchpad" vs "PIXA3854:01 093A:0274 TouchPad". You may try to add another quirk with fixed name.
